## Summary

- Add pre-commit linter for plan structure
- Wire linter into hook chain

## Test plan

- Unit tests run against fixture plans
- Hooks installed via scripts/install-hooks.sh

## Changes

Non-UI deliverable. Shell scripts, YAML, no browser surface.

QA-Verification: ran bash scripts/hooks/pre-commit-zz-plan-structure.sh --fixture-path tests/fixtures/qa-enforcement/plan-structure/a-missing-qa-plan-heading.md --staged-path plans/proposed/test.md; exit 1 (reject) as expected. Ran against g-valid-ui-branch.md; exit 0 (accept) as expected. All eight fixture cases passed.
